# TenderAlert

> Kenya & East Africa B2B tender and bid intelligence platform — automated tender discovery, AI-powered bid readiness scoring, supplier verification, and RFQ workflows for buyers and suppliers.

TenderAlert aggregates public tender notices from e-GP, PPRA, county portals, and other Kenyan sources, then matches them to verified suppliers using a 7-factor opportunity alignment score. Includes 39,000+ historical award records, consortium bidding tools, and KES-denominated subscription tiers via Paystack.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of TenderAlert's tender discovery and bid intelligence platform.
- [Tenders](/tenders): Browse active Kenyan government and private tender opportunities.
- [Smart Matches](/smart-matches): AI-matched tenders ranked by alignment with your profile.
- [AI Analysis](/ai-analysis): Bid Readiness and Historical Alignment scoring for tenders.
- [Service Providers](/providers): Verified supplier directory across Kenya.
- [RFQ](/rfq): Public Request-for-Quotation marketplace for buyers and suppliers.
- [Consortiums](/consortiums): Find partners for joint bidding on large tenders.
- [Community](/community): Q&A forum for procurement professionals.
- [Blog](/blog): Guides on Kenyan procurement, AGPO, e-GP, and winning bids.
- [Subscription](/subscription): Free, Pro, and Business plan pricing (KES).
- [Terms](/terms): Terms of service and AI liability disclaimers.

## Optional

- [Saved Tenders](/saved): Personal saved-tender list (requires sign-in).
- [Notifications](/notifications): User notification center (requires sign-in).
